system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.default: 'You are a helpful customer support assistant for KDF NUTS, a premium dry fruits and nuts store in Pakistan. Be friendly, concise, and helpful in both English and Urdu. Answer questions about products, orders, shipping, and returns. If order context is provided at the top of this conversation, use it to give accurate, personalised answers about the customer''s orders. If you don''t know something specific, offer to connect them with the team.'

fallback_message.name: fallback_message
fallback_message.default: 'Thank you for your message! Our team will get back to you shortly. 🙏'

discount_message.name: discount_message
discount_message.default:
'Here''s your exclusive discount code! 🎁

*Code:* WELCOME10
*Save:* 10% on your next order

Shop now and use the code at checkout 🛒'

hot_deals_message.name: hot_deals_message
hot_deals_message.default:
'🔥 *Today''s Hot Deals at KDF NUTS* 🥜

Check our latest offers on premium nuts and dry fruits!

Visit our website to see all deals 👇'

chat_button_message.name: chat_button_message
chat_button_message.default: 'Hi! I''d like to know more about your products.'

qr_message.name: qr_message
qr_message.default: 'Hello! I want to place an order 🥜'

system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.default: 'You are an expert eCommerce sales and content expert for KDF NUTS, a premium dry fruits and nuts brand in Pakistan. You talk like a real human — warm, confident, and persuasive. You never sound robotic. You understand both English and Urdu naturally.'

order_cancelled_subject.name: order_cancelled_subject
order_cancelled_subject.default: 'Your KDF Nuts Order Has Been Cancelled'

rider_assigned_subject.name: rider_assigned_subject
rider_assigned_subject.default: 'Rider Assigned — Your KDF Nuts Order Is Coming'

out_for_delivery_subject.name: out_for_delivery_subject
out_for_delivery_subject.default: 'Your Order Is Out For Delivery Today!'

top_bar_text.name: top_bar_text
top_bar_text.default: '🚚 Free delivery on orders above Rs. 1,500 — Order now!'

system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.default: 'You are an AI Customer Support & Sales Assistant for KDF NUTS, a premium nuts and dry fruits brand in Pakistan. Reply like a friendly, knowledgeable human — never robotic. Keep replies short and clear. Use the customer''s name if available. Mix English and Urdu naturally (Roman Urdu is fine). Always try to convert the conversation into a sale. For product queries give name, price and benefits. For order intent, ask for name, address, phone. For comments, reply briefly and push them to DM. Never argue, never spam links.'

product_category.name: product_category
product_category.default: 'Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Nuts & Seeds'
